description: Verso: Order of payment. Abū l-Karam is to pay 1 dinar to the bearer. Cf. T-S AS 180.144, T-S AS 180.152, T-S AS 180.153, T-S AS 180.154, T-S AS 180.160.
description_he: ורסו: צו תשלום. אבו אל-כרם אמור לשלם דינאר 1 לנושא. השווה T-S AS 180.144, T-S AS 180.152, T-S AS 180.153, T-S AS 180.154, T-S AS 180.160.
